input.user_input: Revise the payment schedule in Exhibit B so that milestone payments align with the updated project timeline I described in our last conversation.

actual:
I don't have access to our previous conversations or the document containing Exhibit B. 

Could you please upload the document (or paste the text of Exhibit B) and remind me of the updated project timeline? Once you provide those details, I would be happy to revise the payment schedule for you.
